title: Enchantified
description: This resource pack changes the textures of enchanted books to be unique per enchantment and level, in a vanilla feeling way
body:
This is a resource pack that changes enchanted book textures to be completely unique from eachother and matches the enchantment in a vanilla feeling way.

Each book has a unique texture for each enchantment and level, with mixed enchantments having the default book texture.

The preview image contains the max level textures of the following books in order:
- Bane of Arthropods, Smite, Sweeping Edge, Knockback, Sharpness, Fire Aspect
- Flame, Power, Infinity, Piercing, Multishot, Quick Charge
- Punch, Channeling, Impaling, Loyalty, Riptide, Looting
- Wind Burst, Breach, Density, Efficiency, Silk Touch, Fortune
- Luck of the Sea, Lure, Respiration, Aqua Affinity, Mending, Thorns
- Blast Protection, Fire Protection, Projectile Protection, Protection, Depth Strider, Frost Walker
- Feather Falling, Soul Speed, Swift Sneak, Unbreaking, Curse of Binding, Curse of Vanishing
